channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: The War Against Time
item.description: This edition of the Economic Security and Technology Newsletter covers The War Against Time.

item.title: 10 Charts to Explain Global Immunization Policy—Where the United States Stands
item.description: Global efforts to prevent disease outbreaks through immunizations play a role in domestic health security, but shifts in U.S. policy and engagement could threaten preparedness.

item.title: The European Union in the New Trade Disorder
item.description: As protectionism rises and the WTO falters, global trade is being rewired, not collapsing. New hubs centered on the European Union and the CPTPP are reshaping flows, rules, and alliances—and Europe is positioning itself as a leader in a more fragmented but still rules-based system.
